3261430.name: 一路平安
3261430.description:
Previously lost Japanese visual novel, rebuilt and finally on Steam!

Playing as Eimin, embark on a thrilling quest with two angelic girls.

The Emperor of Japan has fallen out with the gods, and it is your job to deliver the Emperor's request and make peace between humans and kami.

You will experience:

• A challenging mission in the Dewa Sanzan mountains, the outcome of which depends on you

• Meeting the lively Kandri and shy Meguri, Christian angels in the service of the Emperor

• Stunning visuals and enchanting music, creating the well-known atmosphere of a doujin game

WARNING:

Please play while connected to the Internet.

Be careful when entering any characters in the response window.

Monitor your physical and mental state as you progress.
3261430.supported_languages: 英语, 俄语, 哈萨克语
